multi_video_sum.summary: C's day involves a variety of activities, starting with preparing a meal and then engaging in transportation methods such as riding a motorcycle, driving a vehicle, and cycling.  C visits a restaurant, interacts with others at a house, and engages in leisure activities such as eating and drinking.  C also works on a laptop, reads notes, and walks.  The day concludes with C getting ready for and traveling to a baseball court.

C's day involves preparing for and going on a bike ride, inspecting the bike and road, and engaging in gardening.  C also spends time climbing, interacting with others, and observing climbing activities in various locations.  Later, C relaxes at home, reading on a tablet and preparing tennis equipment.

C spends their time on a variety of activities, including gardening, cooking, and eating meals.  They also use their phone, work on a computer, and engage in household chores such as washing dishes and brushing teeth.  C interacts with others, spends time outdoors walking and watering flowers, and works indoors arranging documents and writing.  They also watch movies or presentations.

holistic_sum.summary: C engages in a variety of activities, including preparing and eating meals, using a computer and phone, and interacting with others.  C also spends time traveling by car, motorcycle, and bicycle, and participates in sports such as baseball and climbing.  Other activities include gardening, household chores (washing dishes, brushing teeth), and relaxing at home. C also works in an office and spends time reading and writing.
